name: plan-ai-recorder
description: Plan AI Desktop Recorder — capture any meeting and generate tasks with AI

scripts.dev:housegroup: export BRAND_KEY=housegroup && set -a && source .env.housegroup && set +a && electron-vite dev
scripts.package: npm run package:mac && npm run package:win && npm run package:linux
scripts.package:mac: export BRAND_KEY=blueberrybytes && set -a && source .env.production && set +a && node scripts/bump-version.js && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.package:mac:housegroup: export BRAND_KEY=housegroup && set -a && source .env.housegroup.production && set +a && node scripts/bump-version.js && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.package:win: export BRAND_KEY=blueberrybytes && set -a && source .env.production && set +a && node scripts/bump-version.js && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --x64 -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.package:win:housegroup: export BRAND_KEY=housegroup && set -a && source .env.housegroup.production && set +a && node scripts/bump-version.js && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --x64 -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.package:linux: export BRAND_KEY=blueberrybytes && set -a && source .env.production && set +a && node scripts/bump-version.js && electron-vite build && electron-builder --linux -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.release:win: export BRAND_KEY=blueberrybytes && set -a && source .env.production && set +a && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --x64 -p always -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.release:linux: export BRAND_KEY=blueberrybytes && set -a && source .env.production && set +a && electron-vite build && electron-builder --linux -p always -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.release:mac: export BRAND_KEY=blueberrybytes && set -a && source .env.production && set +a && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac -p always -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.release:win:housegroup: export BRAND_KEY=housegroup && set -a && source .env.housegroup.production && set +a && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --x64 -p always -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.release:linux:housegroup: export BRAND_KEY=housegroup && set -a && source .env.housegroup.production && set +a && electron-vite build && electron-builder --linux -p always -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.release:mac:housegroup: export BRAND_KEY=housegroup && set -a && source .env.housegroup.production && set +a && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac -p always -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:local:mac: export BRAND_KEY=blueberrybytes && set -a && source .env.production && set +a && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac -p never -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:local:mac:housegroup: export BRAND_KEY=housegroup && set -a && source .env.housegroup.production && set +a && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac -p never -c electron-builder.config.js
scripts.release:mixed: node scripts/bump-version.js && yarn release:win && yarn release:linux && yarn release:mac
scripts.release:mixed:housegroup: node scripts/bump-version.js && yarn release:win:housegroup && yarn release:linux:housegroup && yarn release:mac:housegroup
scripts.release:all: node scripts/bump-version.js && yarn release:win && yarn release:linux && yarn release:mac && yarn release:win:housegroup && yarn release:linux:housegroup && yarn release:mac:housegroup
